parameters.query: SELECT d.document_id, d.client_id, d.document_uuid, d.original_filename, d.storage_path, d.category, d.priority, d.validation_score, d.status, de.result_data, de.confidence_score FROM documents d LEFT JOIN document_extractions de ON d.document_id = de.document_id WHERE d.status = 'validated' ORDER BY d.priority DESC, d.received_at ASC LIMIT 15;
SELECT config_key, config_value FROM client_config WHERE client_id = $1 AND pack_name = 'DOCS_v1' AND config_key LIKE 'routing_%' ORDER BY config_key;
INSERT INTO document_routing (document_id, client_id, destination_type, destination_config, routing_status, sent_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());
UPDATE documents SET status = 'routed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = $1;
UPDATE documents SET status = 'pending_manual_review', updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = $1;

INSERT INTO workflow_executions (client_id, workflow_name, workflow_id, execution_id, status, input_data, output_data, started_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'completed', $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());
